demo.title: Deposit into any Base charity fund
demo.code:
# Deposit $25 USDC into Money for Trees — receive 25 Money (1:1 receipt)
./scripts/deposit.sh money 25

# Deposit into carbon-retirement fund (CHAR-R)
./scripts/deposit.sh char-r 50

# Deposit cbBTC into BTC for Trees
./scripts/deposit.sh btc-t 0.001

# Or ask Bankr directly:
#   deposit $25 into Money for Trees
#   put $50 into CHAR-R
#   deposit 0.001 cbBTC into BTC for Trees

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured
Fund your Bankr wallet with the relevant deposit asset on Base (USDC for Money/CHAR-R/CCC-R/PRGT; cbBTC for BTC-T; wETH for ETH-T)
Enable arbitrary contract calls (Bankr Security -> keep 'Disable arbitrary contract calls' OFF)
